index.title: Signal Plus Engineering | Elevator Maintenance Software
index.description: B2B SaaS platform for elevator maintenance companies. Track monthly maintenance, service history, tasks, reminders, and 500+ elevators from one place.

demo.title: Demo | Signal Plus Engineering
demo.description: Demo page for the Signal Plus Engineering SaaS platform for elevator maintenance.

hero.eyebrow: B2B SaaS for elevator maintenance companies
hero.title: Never miss monthly maintenance again.
hero.lead: Signal Plus Engineering helps service companies manage 500+ elevators, tasks, reminders, service history, and field activity from one place.

platform.title: One place for every elevator, task, and service visit.
platform.text: Instead of Excel sheets, paper notes, and manual calls, the system gives you a clear view of every elevator, last maintenance date, next visit, assigned engineer, and activity status.

planning.title: Maintenance planning
planning.text: Automatically track monthly checks, deadlines, and service visits that need to be completed on time.

history.title: History per elevator
history.text: Every elevator has its own service history, notes, documents, and engineer activity.

notifications.title: Reminders and notifications
notifications.text: Email and SMS notifications based on the customer package, with support for different notification volumes.

features.title: Built for real field operations.
features.text: The system is designed for companies that manage many locations, engineers, and recurring obligations.

elevators.title: Manage 500+ elevators
elevators.text: Filter by city, building, status, engineer, and next service visit.

map.title: Map and locations
map.text: View elevators by location to plan routes and daily work more effectively.

tasks.title: Engineer tasks
tasks.text: Know exactly who needs to do what, when it was completed, and what was noted in the field.

reports.title: Reports and overviews
reports.text: Monthly reports, engineer activity, and maintenance status for management.

cta.title: Better control, fewer missed deadlines.
cta.text: Move from manual tracking to a professional elevator maintenance system.

about.imageAlt: Preview of the Signal Plus elevator maintenance platform
about.title: A professional approach to maintenance and organization.
about.text1: Signal Plus Engineering develops digital solutions for companies that want better organization, clear records, and timely service execution.
about.text2: Our goal is to help elevator maintenance companies work more efficiently, with less administrative load and more control over every building.

contact.title: Schedule a demo presentation.
contact.text: Fill out the form and our team will contact you for a short presentation of the system.
contact.noteTitle: What do you get in the demo?
contact.noteText: A platform walkthrough, elevator example, reminder example, and implementation proposal.

form.name: Full name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us briefly about your company and number of elevators.
form.missing: Please fill in the required fields.
form.success: The request is ready. The form does not currently send data.

demo.title: The demo will be available soon.
demo.text: We are preparing a system preview with a sample dashboard, elevator list, maintenance statuses, reminders, and basic demo navigation.

footer.text: B2B SaaS platform for elevator maintenance.
